embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s

details.note: message was not in cache — only fields in raw_data available

raw_data.content:
# 📋 Skip Day System (Part 1/2)
## 🎯 What is a Skip Day?
Skip day points shift your monthly payment date. **1 point = 1 day** (positive = later, negative = earlier).
> The logic: 1 skip day point = 1 day delayed pay. If you didn't complete markers on a given day, your pay shifts to reflect that. The base late penalty is +2 because it's 1 day for the missed task day + 1 day as actual punishment.
## 🔴 How You Earn Skip Day Points
**Didn't complete all markers correctly by 06:00 UTC next day:**
- 1 day late → **+2**
- 2 days late → **+3**
- 3 days late → **+4**
- Each additional day → +1 more
*Includes incorrect testing — attempted all markers but did them wrong = same as not completing = +2 minimum.*
**🛡️ Reviewer error protection:** If a reviewer wrongly reviews your marker, you are **NOT** liable to fix it that day. The marker transfers to the next day and must be tested then. Fail to test it the next day → standard late penalty applies (+2, escalating per extra day).
**+3 FLAT — Deliverable Failure** (if given, this is the only penalty for the day — other penalties do not stack):
- No submission
- Ignoring messages
- Skipping any marker (not attempting)
- Missing/broken clips
- Missing/broken fortnite.gg link
- Any submission not independently verifiable by a reviewer
> ⚠️ **ENSURE YOUR CLIPS WORK + FORTNITE.GG LINK IS INCLUDED. THEY MUST BE VIEWABLE BY SOMEONE ELSE FOR REVIEW LATER — NOT JUST WORKING ON YOUR END. YOU ARE LIABLE FOR THE TASKS YOU COMPLETE.**
**4+ attempts on same map: +1** (wasting server resources)
⏬ *Part 2 below: advance notice + how to remove points + examples*

raw_data.content:
# 🗺️ Map Reviewing System (Part 1/2)
## Part 1: Standard Reviewer Deadlines
**Active hours: 12:00 UTC → 22:00 UTC**

During active hours, any submitted map must be claimed by a reviewer within **1 hour** of submission.

**🌙 Off-Hours: 22:00 UTC → 12:00 UTC**
No drop map reviewers are expected to be online during this period — there is no claim window and no reviewer obligation.

**Tester skip day penalties still apply in full during off-hours:**
- Map isn't reviewed and the day ends → skip points apply as normal
- Map is reviewed but mistakes are found with no time left to fix them → skip points still apply

Submitting during off-hours is entirely at your own risk.

**Per-map review time:** **5 minutes per marker, with a 30-minute minimum.**
- 6-marker map → 30 min (floor kicks in)
- 20-marker map → 100 min
- 30-marker map → 150 min

**Reviewer accountability:**
- Reviewer gets a penalty if they exceed the claim window or go AFK and come back
- **Drop map tester is not liable to do fixes** in that case

## Part 2: Tester Protections & Abuse Monitoring
- If drop map reviewers miss their claim window → drop map tester not responsible for any resulting map mistakes
- Drop map testers repeatedly rushing maps (submitting right before deadline cutoffs to force fast reviews) will be monitored — may result in **serious consequences**
- Rules may adjust based on feedback, timezones, and reasonable judgment

⏬ *Part 2 below: drop map reviewer self-review rules + audit policy*

details.note: message was not in cache — only fields in raw_data available

raw_data.content:
# 🗺️ Map Reviewing System (Part 2/2)
## Part 3: Drop Map Testers Who Are Also Drop Map Reviewers
If a drop map tester also holds the drop map reviewer role, they can **review their own maps at any time** — Part 1's claim windows do not apply.

**Self-review obligation:** Since you can review at any time, if no other drop map reviewer is reviewing your map, **you must review it yourself.** Part 1's standard deadlines are ignored because you have the privilege and ability to handle the timing yourself.

**Penalties for incorrect self-review:**
- **No points awarded for that session (aka day)** By extension loose daily streak if only reviewed your map + accuracy streak that day.
- **+2 skip points for the day** *(see Skip Day System: a wrong marker = not completing all markers correctly = +2 minimum)*

**Queue privilege:** May skip other queue maps to prioritize your own.

**Claim message format:** `Doing my map [@DropMapReviewer] scroll up and do most recent map`

## ⚠️ 100% Audit Policy
**All maps are 100% audited regardless of who reviewed them.**

For **Part 3 self-reviewers**, any mistakes caught by audit result in:
- **+2 skip points**
- **No session credit**

*(Standard reviewer mistakes under Part 1 fall under the existing reviewer penalty.)*

## Part 1: Standard Reviewer Deadlines
**Active hours: 12:00 UTC → 22:00 UTC**

During active hours, any submitted map must be claimed by a reviewer within **1 hour** of submission.

**🌙 Off-Hours: 22:00 UTC → 12:00 UTC**
No drop map reviewers are expected to be online during this period — there is no claim window and no reviewer obligation.

**Tester skip day penalties still apply in full during off-hours:**
- Map is reviewed but mistakes are found with no time left to fix them → skip points still apply

Submitting during off-hours is entirely at your own risk.

**Per-map review time:** **5 minutes per marker, with a 30-minute minimum.**
- 6-marker map → 30 min (floor kicks in)
- 20-marker map → 100 min
- 30-marker map → 150 min

**Reviewer accountability:**
- Reviewer gets a penalty if they exceed the claim window or go AFK and come back
- **Drop map tester is not liable to do fixes** in that case

## Part 2: Tester Protections & Abuse Monitoring
- If drop map reviewers miss their claim window → drop map tester not responsible for any resulting map mistakes
- Drop map testers repeatedly rushing maps (submitting right before deadline cutoffs to force fast reviews) will be monitored — may result in **serious consequences**
- Rules may adjust based on feedback, timezones, and reasonable judgment

⏬ *Part 2 below: drop map reviewer self-review rules + audit policy*

embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s

details.note: message was not in cache — only fields in raw_data available

raw_data.content:
# 🗺️ Map Reviewing System (Part 1/2)
## Part 1: Standard Reviewer Deadlines
**☀️ Active hours: 12:00 UTC → 22:00 UTC**

During active hours, any submitted map must be claimed by a reviewer within **1 hour** of submission.

**🌙 Off-Hours: 22:00 UTC → 12:00 UTC**
No drop map reviewers are expected to be online during this period — there is no claim window and no reviewer obligation.

**Tester skip day penalties still apply in full during off-hours:**
- Map is reviewed but mistakes are found with no time left to fix them → skip points still apply

Submitting during off-hours is entirely at your own risk.

**Per-map review time:** **5 minutes per marker, with a 30-minute minimum.**
- 6-marker map → 30 min (floor kicks in)
- 20-marker map → 100 min
- 30-marker map → 150 min

**Reviewer accountability:**
- Reviewer gets a penalty if they exceed the claim window or go AFK and come back
- **Drop map tester is not liable to do fixes** in that case

## Part 2: Tester Protections & Abuse Monitoring
- If drop map reviewers miss their claim window → drop map tester not responsible for any resulting map mistakes
- Drop map testers repeatedly rushing maps (submitting right before deadline cutoffs to force fast reviews) will be monitored — may result in **serious consequences**
- Rules may adjust based on feedback, timezones, and reasonable judgment

⏬ *Part 2 below: drop map reviewer self-review rules + audit policy*

raw_data.content:
⚜ **STAFF LEVELS & PAY STRUCTURE** ⚜
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Your level determines your pay. No exceptions. No negotiations.
The more you put in, the more you earn. It is that simple.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

**〔 LEVEL 1 〕 Paid Tester** 🔰
> Base pay.
> You are here, you are working, and you are getting paid for it.
> This is the starting point. Where you go from here is entirely up to you.
> <@821412756729233439> 


**〔 LEVEL 2 〕 Improving Tester** 📋
> Pay increase unlocked.
> Minus - 3 Skip points https://discord.com/channels/1041450125391835186/1484447854633287821/1484447951425241088
> ✦ You must still be doing everything from Level 1.
> You show up with a good attitude. You take feedback on board. You are willing to learn and you are visibly getting better.
> This level is not about being perfect — it is about proving you want to be.
> <@767494211359473676>  
> <@871514657804931112> 
> <@1441424672930398359> 

**〔 LEVEL 3 〕 Full Marker Tester** 🎯
> Pay increase unlocked.
> Minus - 5  Skip points https://discord.com/channels/1041450125391835186/1484447854633287821/1484447951425241088
> ✦ You must still be doing everything from Levels 1 and 2.
> You complete all assigned markers on the day, every time.
> No missing taks. No half-finished sessions. You do the task  in full and you do it consistently.
> This is the standard every tester should be working toward.
> <@1005758035723026444>
> <@1250261619141775402>

raw_data.content:
💰 **Pay Information**

**Range:** $1 – $500 AUD/month
**Payment Cycle:** Every 31 days of completed testing once you're in a paid testing role

**Your earnings depend on how many markers you complete daily** — and the more you do, the more you earn *per marker* too:

> 🔹 ~4 markers/day → $10 – $40/month (10-30 mins)
> 🔸 ~10 markers/day → $75 – $150/month (1-2 hours)
> 🔶 ~20 markers/day → $200 – $300/month (2-3 hours)
> 🟡 ~25 markers/day → $300 – $450/month (3-4 hours)
> YOU DO NOT GOT TO TEST THESE AMOUNT OF MARKERS THIS IS JUST AN INDICATION OF EXAMPLES OF PAYMENTS YOU CAN TEST LIKE 7 MARKERS DAILY ETC

The more you do, the faster your pay scales up! 📈

- Please note this tend to increase every month the payment you get as the server grows. 
- For proof https://discord.com/channels/1041450125391835186/1468054372293541981 thats is impossible to get scammed here as i need you guys for as long as possible and would make no sense to scam you. 

-# Note these are a guide to help educate you how this system works

embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s
